title: AI Filmmaking Tutorial: Character Consistency Fixed!
summary: ImagineArt Film Studio is a browser-based video generation tool that addresses character consistency in AI films through storyboard mode and character locking. It includes features like multi-shot generation with camera presets, extend functionality for longer sequences, and a built-in timeline editor for trimming and music integration, allowing complete short film production without external software.
